differences: Main PANTRY 390px and 320px geometry now tracks the fixed reference closely; remaining deltas are limited to browser font rasterization and existing shared bottom-tab icon stroke details.
PANTRY_ADD_SHEET header, grid, footer, disabled cards, and 320px clipping align with the fixed reference within a few pixels.
PANTRY_BUNDLE_PICKER top position, header, cards, icons, and narrow viewport height align with the fixed reference; text truncation follows MVP data length.
reasoning: The Wave1 pantry mobile screen, add sheet, and bundle picker now match the prototype layout, color, spacing, radius, and bottom-sheet positions closely while preserving MVP pantry API behavior. Residual differences are from runtime font rendering and shared navigation icon implementation rather than pantry-specific layout.
